QueryLogRecord.logStreamName: Log stream name, max 192 characters, allowed characters: `a-z, A-Z, 0-9, '_', '-', '.', '/'`
QueryLogRecord.logStoreType: Log store type, LOGSTORE or LOGSTORE_VIEW
QueryLogRecord.marker: Valid only when query is a search statement; specifies the starting row for the query. Default: empty string.
QueryLogRecord.limit: Valid only when query is a search statement; maximum number of log entries to return. Min: 0, max: 1000, default: 100. (Ignored when pagination parameters are present.)
QueryLogRecord.sort: Valid only when query is a search statement; log sort order. desc: descending by timestamp, asc: ascending by timestamp. Default: desc.
QueryLogRecord.pageNo: Starting page for log retrieval. Valid only when query is a search statement and pageSize is present.
QueryLogRecord.pageSize: Page size for log retrieval. Valid only when query is a search statement and pageNo is present.
